articles.title: Jayson Tatum’s return was essentially perfect: 7 takeaways as Celtics blow out Mavericks
articles.description:
Tatum deserved all of the immense fanfare that TD Garden can provide, and starting him made sure that his return carried the right amount of gravitas.

The post Jayson Tatum’s return was essentially perfect: 7 takeaways as Celtics blow out Mavericks appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Celtics defeated Mavericks 130-100 on March 6, showcasing strong team performance.
Jayson Tatum returned to TD Garden, receiving enthusiastic support from fans.
Tatum's return boosts Celtics' morale and strengthens their playoff positioning.

articles.title: Why Bruins made right call to stand pat at trade deadline
articles.description:
“We stayed committed. We didn’t deviate from what we felt was the right choice."

The post Why Bruins made right call to stand pat at trade deadline appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Bruins management decided to retain current roster during the March 2026 trade deadline.
General Manager Don Sweeney emphasized commitment to team chemistry and strategy.
Boston fans can expect continuity as the team aims for playoff success.

articles.title: Patriots reportedly miss out on Maxx Crosby trade
articles.description:
The Athletic’s Dianna Russini said Crosby “had his eye on the Patriots” and two other teams.

The post Patriots reportedly miss out on Maxx Crosby trade appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Patriots missed a trade opportunity for Maxx Crosby, a key defensive player.
Crosby was reportedly interested in joining the Patriots among other teams.
This trade miss may affect the Patriots' defensive strategy for the upcoming season.

articles.title: This weekend’s US clock change is a problem, and there’s a deep divide on how to fix it
articles.description:
The political moves necessary to change the system haven't succeeded because opinions on the issue and its potential impacts are sharply divided.

The post This weekend’s US clock change is a problem, and there’s a deep divide on how to fix it appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: This weekend, Boston residents will adjust clocks for Daylight Saving Time on March 12.
Political efforts to change the clock system have failed due to divided public opinion.
Potential health impacts and economic effects are concerns for local communities.
